channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Fly tipping outside 3 Park Street, 23rd March
item.description:
Rubbish was left outside the entrance to our business - the Jackman store at 3 Park Street. To open up and keep our entrance clear, I put it by the road work fencing, just front of our shop.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 3, Park Street, The Borough, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bike being left in front of house, 23rd March
item.description:
For a very long time, rental bike are being left in front of my nan's house, who is a wheelchair user. Please could the area be marked as a no parking zone on the app. My nan is finding it hard some days to leave her front gate.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Whitmore Estate, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bloomsbury Place opp All Star Bowling Alley and North East cr of Bloomsbury Sq, 23rd March
item.description:
Cover has come off on electric pole

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 4, Bloomsbury Place, Bloomsbury, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Engine idling, 23rd March
item.description:
Engine idling on Tothill street at 11am - black van with red door
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Tothill Street, Millbank, City of Westminster
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Resurficing needed. poor cracked pavenents, 23rd March
item.description:
Multiple cracted areas on prestbury square pavements. no maintenance in over 15 years on this street. had thames water moving water meters over 10 years ago and patchwork made surface deterriorate with time even more. multiple wheelchair users , prams users and special needs residents on street which is gettung more unsafe to walk. please review example images

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Prestbury Square, Elmstead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Shattered glass all over cycling lane, 23rd March
item.description:
Not visible on the photo, but big shards of glass across the whole cycling lane in this area. It stretches over about 3-4 meters of the cycling lane. Would be great to get the car street sweep to go over it a few times to get the full width of the lane.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): West Bank, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Spillage of paint or other bright coloured substance, 23rd March
item.description:
Has been driven through and is spread up and down the road in an unsightly manner.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 60, Ravensbury Road, St Mary Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Litter on Marton Road, 23rd March
item.description:
A lot of litter on Marton Road just south of Church Street near Schnitzel restaurant

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Marton Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Cracks between blocks wheel gets stuck, 23rd March
item.description:
We have prams and wheelchair users on this side of street . its only step free access and cracks between conctete on incline part of pavement gone so big wheels gets stuck. a child sumersalted after scooter wheel got stuck,lucky to escape major neck injury by landing on grass.its not acceptable, please add to repairs .not maintained in over 15 years.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Prestbury Square, Elmstead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Opposite/o/s - 20, 23rd March
item.description:
Bike, microwave and other household rubbish
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Allington Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Fly-tip Medium - Up to medium size van load

item.title: Flytipping, 23rd March
item.description:
Hi, Large build-up of rubbish, starting to smell and spilling onto stairs. This is all fly-tipping and could you please remove ASAP. The build-up is starting to smell and take up space. Cheers

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Haberdasher Street, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped bed and glass window panes, 23rd March
item.description:
Dumped bed and glass window panes which have been smashed

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 9, Rookery Gardens, Poverest, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipping, 23rd March
item.description:
Flytipping

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Kynaston Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Cracks by water drain and ineven surface on prestbury square, 23rd March
item.description:
Multiple surfaces and holes in pavement. not maintained in over 15 years. need urgent attention with multiple injuries caused by tripping outside our homes. From house 78-106. thames watermoved meters and done poor job resurficing which gone worse with years and weather

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Prestbury Square, Elmstead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: A Fly Tipping on Street problem has been found, 23rd March
item.description:
This has been left outside 66 Nightingale Street for weeks with nobody clearing up

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Nightingale Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping and waste dumping, 23rd March
item.description:
Site was cleaned up a few days ago, it is now again filled with waste from households and businesses, spreading across the street and grass behind. The bins need to be moved to stop the constant fly tipping.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Queens Drive, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Over flowing waste litter bin overflowing, 23rd March
item.description:
This bin is continually being filled overflowing with bagged up waste and empty wine bottles rather than litter. It is a continual nuisance and attracts rats which have infested a number of nearby homes as a result. It needs removing please or emptying every 48 hours as you have removed the other bins in the loclaity. This is a consistent and persistent problem. The photo provided is typical of how this eyesore presents itself.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 31, The Greenway, Poverest, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Step demaged trip hazard wheel chaiemrs access needed, 23rd March
item.description:
Stairs been getting more unsafe every year. not repaired in over 15 years. wheel chair user lives opposite and registered childminder next door. need wheelchair access and safer stairs for pram access.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Prestbury Square, Elmstead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti on Northeastern side of Lesnes Abbey bridge, 23rd March
item.description:
Multiple instances of graffiti on this bridge. On the ramp itself, the wall has "Zavz" in white spray paint. Next to that on the wall above it has "Banksy" (but that's definitely not him) in white paint. And on the bridge itself on the eastern wall there's "Hog" in blue spray paint.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Abbey Way, West Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish accumulation adjacent road kerb which is not removed by the Street cleaning vehicle as it cannot reach., 23rd March
item.description:
An accumulation of leaves, rubbish etc against the kerb in 4 corners of hammerhead which is not cleared by the street cleaning vehicle as it cannot access. Needs clearing by manual sweeping. Looks very untidy.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Rutland Gate, Shortlands, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
